concerns.detail: Insertion reveals identifying details about private individuals: specific location (Atlanta), housing arrangement (2b2b at friend's home), and describes a high school student and PhD student involved in a paid tutoring scheme. This is detailed enough to de-anonymize the individuals.
concerns.excerpt: 国内高中生飞来亚特兰大住在我朋友的家里(2b2b)找了个他的PHD给他辅导科研

concerns.detail: Appended signature appears to be a real full name of a private individual (likely a student editor) added to the document header.
Unsupported character judgment attacking the subject's motives/greed ('wants too much') rather than focusing on specific verifiable advising practices.
concerns.excerpt: 这人就是想要的太多了
